headline: Agentic LLM Systems | Multimodal Generative AI | Medical Imaging/Reporting | Research-to-Production
blurb: Senior ML scientist with 10+ years of experience across artificial intelligence, medical imaging, and computer vision. Built and scaled LLM-based radiology reporting agents deployed across 160+ healthcare facilities, founded and scaled OmniSync AI to 2,800+ users and 150,000+ generated videos, and translates research depth into reliable infrastructure, deployment, and measurable product impact.

metrics.label: Years in AI, Medical Imaging, and Computer Vision
metrics.detail: Experience across algorithm design, clinical data acquisition, infrastructure, deployment, team leadership, and product.

metrics.label: Production Releases Shipped
metrics.detail: Major production releases led for Report Assistant at Synthesis Health.

metrics.label: Clinical Reports / Month
metrics.detail: Radiology report volume supported by Report Assistant across 160+ healthcare facilities.

metrics.label: AI Videos Generated
metrics.detail: Multimodal generation volume delivered through OmniSync AI for 2,800+ users and enterprise clients.

metrics.label: Research Publications
metrics.detail: Published in top medical imaging journals and conferences including IEEE TMI, Radiology, MICCAI, IEEE TUFFC, and IEEE IUS.

metrics.label: Scholar
metrics.detail: Recipient of the highly competitive Erasmus Mundus Joint Master Scholarship in Medical Imaging and Applications.

metrics.label: Planning Speedup
metrics.detail: Reduced prostate brachytherapy planning time from about 20 minutes to about 3 seconds.

valueProps: Agentic LLM systems for clinical reporting, validation, correction, contextual conclusions, and structured output generation in production settings.
Research-to-production AI delivery across medical imaging, high-stakes clinical workflows, and real-world deployment constraints.
Cloud-native ML infrastructure across AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, distributed inference, and production monitoring.
Multimodal generative AI systems for video, audio, and speech workflows under latency and cost constraints.
Technical leadership spanning product direction, experimentation, shipping, and mentoring ML and engineering teams.
